records.content:
Expected MSE: E\big[(y_0 - \hat{f}(x_0))^2\big] = \operatorname{Var}(\hat{f}(x_0)) + \big[\operatorname{Bias}(\hat{f}(x_0))\big]^2 + \operatorname{Var}(\epsilon)

Variance: Variation we get by using different training data sets. Related to overfitting.

\text{Var}(\epsilon) = Lower error bound; irreducible error.

Bias: Error between the learning model and the true function.

Image("data/Basic/MSE-breakdown.png")

Bayes Classifier: A baseline model with an assumption that test errors are minimized when each new observation is assigned to the most likely class.

For a new observation, choose the class with the largest probability.

\Pr(Y = j \mid X)
